title: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
summary: SoftBank shares declined 11% in a U.S. tech sector sell-off driven by profit taking. The decline reflects broader market volatility affecting technology stocks.
content: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

zh.title: 软银股价在更广泛的科技股抛售中暴跌逾11%
zh.summary: 在美国科技板块因获利回吐而抛售的背景下，软银股价下跌11%。这次下跌反映了影响科技股的更广泛市场波动。

title: Finland's president says EU should expand to 40 states — including Canada
summary: Finnish President Alexander Stubb advocates for EU expansion to 40 member states, including Canada, to strengthen the bloc's global influence. The proposal suggests a significant shift in EU membership strategy to compete internationally.
content: Finnish President Alexander Stubb said the European Union needs to expand to project power on the global stage.

zh.title: 芬兰总统称欧盟应扩展到40个国家——包括加拿大
zh.summary: 芬兰总统亚历山大·斯图布倡导欧盟扩展到40个成员国，包括加拿大，以加强该联盟的全球影响力。该提议表明欧盟成员国战略的重大转变，以在国际竞争中占据优势。

title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
summary: Biotech mergers and acquisitions are accelerating in 2026, driven by patent expirations, strong public markets, and pharmaceutical companies expanding their drug pipelines. This activity level marks the strongest year for biotech dealmaking since before the COVID-19 pandemic.
content: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

zh.title: "就像商品要绝版一样大量购买"：生物科技并购有望创下疫前最佳年份
zh.summary: 2026年生物科技并购交易加速，由专利到期、强劲的公开市场和制药公司扩展其药物管道所驱动。这一交易水平标志着自COVID-19疫情前以来生物科技交易最强的一年。

title: 'Library of Things' aims to help people save money
summary: A 'Library of Things' initiative in Leamington allows residents to borrow household items, reducing consumer spending and promoting resource sharing. The volunteer-led program offers an alternative to purchasing new goods.
content: Volunteers in Leamington have launched a new type of library where you can borrow household items.

zh.title: "东西图书馆"旨在帮助人们省钱
zh.summary: 莱明顿的"东西图书馆"倡议允许居民借用家居用品，减少消费支出并促进资源共享。这个志愿者主导的计划为购买新商品提供了替代方案。

title: S&P 500 futures fall after index snaps 9-day win streak amid rising Middle East tensions: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 ended its nine-day winning streak as rising oil prices and Treasury yields pressured all three major indexes. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East contributed to the broader market decline.
content: Rising oil prices and Treasury yields weighed all three major indexes lower on Wednesday.

zh.title: 标普500期货下跌，指数在中东局势升温中打破9天连涨纪录：实时更新
zh.summary: 由于油价上升和国债收益率上升对三大主要指数造成压力，标普500指数结束了九天的连涨纪录。中东地缘政治紧张局势加剧了更广泛的市场下跌。

title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
summary: U.S. officials have confirmed the presence of flesh-eating screwworms in the country, raising public health and agricultural concerns. This parasitic infestation poses a threat to both human and animal health.

zh.title: 美国官员称确认发现食肉蝇蛆虫
zh.summary: 美国官员已确认该国境内存在食肉蝇蛆虫，引发了公共卫生和农业担忧。这种寄生虫感染对人类和动物健康都构成威胁。

title: Honeywell's Quantinuum raises $1.68 billion in U.S. IPO as quantum computing heats up, Reuters reports
summary: Honeywell's Quantinuum quantum computing company completed a $1.68 billion U.S. IPO at $60 per share, reflecting growing investor interest in the quantum computing sector. The offering underscores momentum in advanced computing technologies.
content: Honeywell's Quantinuum said on Wednesday it had raised $1.68 billion in its U.S. initial public offering after pricing shares at $60 apiece.

zh.title: 霍尼韦尔量子公司Quantinuum在美IPO融资16.8亿美元，量子计算领域升温
zh.summary: 霍尼韦尔旗下量子计算公司Quantinuum完成16.8亿美元美国IPO，股价定在每股60美元，反映出投资者对量子计算领域日益增长的兴趣。此次发行彰显了先进计算技术的发展势头。

title: CrowdStrike is a buy, just not yet. Here's why
summary: CrowdStrike reported strong earnings results and announced a 4-for-1 stock split, though the stock declined as some investors took profits. An analyst views the pullback as a potential buying opportunity for long-term investors.
content: On top of the beat-and-raise, CrowdStrike announced a 4-for-1 stock split. But short-term thinkers sold the stock.

zh.title: CrowdStrike值得买入，但时机还不对
zh.summary: CrowdStrike报告了强劲的财报业绩并宣布实施4:1股票分割，尽管股价因部分投资者获利回吐而下跌。分析师认为这次回调可能是长期投资者的买入机会。

title: Quantinuum raises $1.68 billion in IPO that seeks to give quantum computing more street cred
summary: Quantinuum raised $1.68 billion through a traditional IPO, bucking the trend of other quantum computing companies that have opted for SPAC mergers. This direct public offering signals confidence in the quantum sector's maturation and mainstream credibility. The move distinguishes Quantinuum's path to public markets and provides a validation point for the still-developing quantum computing industry.
content: Quantinuum is pursuing a traditional IPO, whereas many other quantum players have gone the SPAC route.

zh.title: Quantinuum通过IPO融资16.8亿美元，提升量子计算的认可度
zh.summary: Quantinuum通过传统IPO融资16.8亿美元，打破了其他量子计算公司选择SPAC合并的趋势。这次直接公开发行表明量子行业的成熟和主流认可度提升。这一举措区别了Quantinuum的上市路径，为仍在发展中的量子计算行业提供了验证。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower on renewed Middle East tensions
summary: Asia-Pacific stock markets declined following escalated tensions between Iran and the U.S., raising concerns about potential geopolitical spillover effects. Investors worry that Middle East tensions could sustain elevated inflation, complicating economic outlooks for the region. The market reaction reflects broader nervousness about global supply chain disruptions.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.

zh.title: 亚太市场因中东局势紧张而低开
zh.summary: 亚太股市因伊朗与美国紧张关系升级而下跌，引发对地缘政治溢出效应的担忧。投资者担心中东紧张局势可能导致通胀居高不下，复杂化该地区的经济前景。市场反应反映了对全球供应链中断的广泛担忧。

title: Inside India newsletter: Why Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have surged past India within a week
summary: Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have outpaced India's in recent weeks as global investors shift focus away from Indian equities. India's cooling domestic consumption narrative and technological lag in artificial intelligence are driving the divergence. The shift signals investor reassessment of growth prospects across different Asian economies.
content: The Indian equity market is losing favour with global investors, as its domestic consumption story weakens and the country lags in AI.

zh.title: 印度通讯：台湾和韩国股市为何在一周内超越印度
zh.summary: 近期台湾和韩国股市超越了印度，全球投资者焦点从印度股票转向其他市场。印度国内消费冷却和人工智能技术滞后是导致分化的原因。这一转变反映投资者正在重新评估不同亚洲经济体的增长前景。

title: Broadcom’s stock falls despite accelerating AI-chip growth
summary: Broadcom's stock declined despite the company's AI chip business accelerating, as the latest revenue results failed to exceed already high market expectations. The sell-off reflects investor disappointment following the stock's recent sharp gains, which had already priced in strong performance. The disconnect highlights how companies must deliver exceptional results to overcome stretched valuations.
content: Latest revenue figures lack meaningful upside after the stock’s sharp recent rally.

zh.title: 博通股价下跌，尽管AI芯片业务加速增长
zh.summary: 尽管公司AI芯片业务加速，但博通股价下跌，因为最新收入结果未能超越已经很高的市场预期。抛售反映了投资者的失望，因为股票近期大幅上涨已经反映了强劲表现。这种脱节突显出公司必须提供卓越业绩才能克服被高估的估值。

title: CrowdStrike’s stock falls as investors find more reason to pan cybersecurity earnings
summary: CrowdStrike's stock declined despite exceeding financial expectations, following a pattern similar to fellow cybersecurity firm Palo Alto Networks. The sell-off suggests investors are becoming increasingly selective about cybersecurity valuations despite strong earnings performance. The trend indicates growing skepticism about growth premiums in the cybersecurity sector.
content: Like Palo Alto Networks before it, CrowdStrike beats financial expectations but sees its stock get punished

zh.title: 随着投资者对网络安全收益的批评，CrowdStrike股价下跌
zh.summary: CrowdStrike股价下跌，尽管超过财务预期，但跟随同行网络安全公司Palo Alto Networks的模式。抛售表明投资者对网络安全估值变得更加挑剔，尽管收益表现强劲。这一趋势表明对网络安全部门增长溢价的怀疑不断增加。

title: Why we're raising our price target on Broadcom despite its post-earnings sell-off
summary: Despite a post-earnings stock decline, analysts raised their price target for Broadcom, citing the company's robust AI business fundamentals. The upgrade reflects confidence that Broadcom's artificial intelligence revenue will exceed conservative market estimates going forward. The divergence between stock performance and analyst outlook suggests the market may have overreacted to earnings results.
content: Broadcom's AI business will continue to shine and outpace the conservative forecast.

zh.title: 尽管博通收益后抛售，我们为什么要提高其价格目标
zh.summary: 尽管收益后股价下跌，分析师提高了博通的价格目标，理由是公司强大的AI业务基础。升级反映了分析师相信博通的人工智能收入将在未来超过保守的市场预期。股票表现与分析师前景之间的分歧表明市场可能对收益结果反应过度。

title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
summary: Amazon engineers publicly criticized the company for investing $200 billion in AI infrastructure while simultaneously laying off 30,000 employees. The contradiction highlights tensions between corporate technology investments and workforce reduction decisions. The criticism reflects growing employee concerns about strategic priorities and job security at major tech firms.
content: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

zh.title: 亚马逊西雅图工程师抨击公司在建设AI数据中心同时裁员30,000人
zh.summary: 亚马逊工程师公开批评该公司在投资2000亿美元用于AI基础设施的同时裁员30,000名员工。这种矛盾突显了企业科技投资与劳动力缩减决策之间的紧张关系。这一批评反映了主要科技公司员工对战略优先事项和工作安全的日益增长的关注。
